task_completion.description: Verify the Alert Profile name and category are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an alert configuration screen or summary showing the Profile Name as 'Mass File Deletion Incident' and the Category as 'File Audit > File Deleted' (or similar file deletion category).

task_completion.description: Verify the alert severity is set to Critical.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a severity dropdown, radio button, or label explicitly set to 'Critical' for this alert profile.

task_completion.description: Verify the threshold event count is configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a threshold setting indicating that the alert triggers when more than '50' events occur.

task_completion.description: Verify the threshold time window is configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a time window setting associated with the threshold indicating '1 minute' (or 60 seconds).

task_completion.description: Verify the user 'BackupSvc' is excluded from the alert.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a filter, exclusion rule, or 'Exclude Users' field containing the username 'BackupSvc'.

task_completion.description: Verify the screenshot of the configuration was saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file explorer window, image viewer, or terminal command confirming that a file named 'mass_deletion_alert_evidence.png' exists in 'C:\workspace'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual ManageEngine ADAudit Plus web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard web browser UI elements (address bar, tabs) displaying the ADAudit Plus application, rather than a mock UI or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the configuration was done via the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of form filling, dropdown selections, and button clicks in the ADAudit Plus interface, rather than API scripts or database injection commands.

integrity.description: Verify the saved screenshot contains the actual alert configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: The image saved to the workspace must clearly show the ADAudit Plus interface with the specific alert settings requested, not a generic or downloaded image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Profile Name: 'Mass File Deletion Incident'. Category: 'File Audit > File Deleted'. Severity: 'Critical'. Threshold: > 50 events within 1 minute. Excluded User: 'BackupSvc'. Evidence Path: 'C:\workspace\mass_deletion_alert_evidence.png'.
